zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen於大約1105年出生時，他的父親Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen46歲，母親Ida de Chiny29歲。他於大約1139年與Luitgard von Sulzbach結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1142年6月13日在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文享年38歲，埋葬在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen was born about 1105, his father, Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, was 46 and his mother, Ida de Chiny, was 29. He married Luitgard von Sulzbach about 1139. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 13 June 1142, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 38, and was buried in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen est né environ 1105, son père, Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Ida de Chiny, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Luitgard von Sulzbach environ 1139. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 13 juin 1142, à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen um 1105 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen 46 und seine Mutter Ida de Chiny 29. Er hat um 1139 Luitgard von Sulzbach geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 13. Juni 1142 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien und wurde in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen è nato il circa 1105, il suo padre, Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Ida de Chiny, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Luitgard von Sulzbach circa 1139. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 13 giugno 1142, nel Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingenが約1105年に生まれた時，父Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingenは46歳，母Ida de Chinyは29歳であった。約1139年にLuitgard von Sulzbachと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1142年6月13日にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンで38歳で死去し，ベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen(이)가 대략 1105년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Ida de Chiny(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1139년 Luitgard von Sulzbach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1142년 6월 13일 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen nasceu aproximadamente 1105, seu pai, Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Ida de Chiny, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Luitgard von Sulzbach aproximadamente 1139. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 13 de junho de 1142, em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen родился около 1105 г., его отцу по имени Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida de Chiny, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Luitgard von Sulzbach около 1139 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 13 июня 1142 г. в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godfried II van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen nació aproximadamente 1105, su papá, Godfried I van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Ida de Chiny, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Luitgard von Sulzbach aproximadamente 1139. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 13 de junio de 1142, en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica.
